headline: AI-chip rout: CRDO -10.5%, QCOM/ADI -8%, NXPI/KEYS -7.6%, LRCX/MRVL -5-6%, CAT -5.5%. SK Hynix HBM4 slowdown + Broadcom capex miss. CWAN merger-arb closed June 25 at $24.55.

Persisting AI-chip rout (Friday June 26 close, pre-market Monday). LRCX and MRVL escalated to RED on thesis cross-check. CAT improving — tariff revised down to $2.2-2.4B, pre-market bounce. CRDO stabilized. Hyperscaler late-July earnings window primary macro risk.

AEM new RED — Q2 gold crash -14% ($4,861→$4,040/oz) matches thesis key_risk #1 (AMBER→RED). MARA/HUT new AMBER on crypto weakness and Q1 EPS miss. STLD new AMBER on Q2 margin squeeze. LRCX/KEYS downgraded AMBER on recovery. CAT + ADI resolved GREEN. MRVL/CRDO/QCOM persisting RED.

Broad AI-chip rebound accelerating: CRDO +10.7%, AMD +7.6%, MRVL +7.1%, LRCX +5.5% (resolved GREEN), TSM +4.9%. QCOM sole persisting RED (memory shortage, 4th session). New AMBER: SYK -4.8% (Russell index removal + ex-div + bearish valuation report) and COIN -3.6% (crypto rout, same theme pressuring MARA/HUT). STLD resolved GREEN — Q2 guidance shows sequential improvement, correcting the 06-30 margin-compression read. CWAN roster issue still open (4th run).
